title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: local LLM runner with a built-in model library and OpenAI-compatible REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, generate, JSON mode, streaming.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same features as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter to use Ollama models for chat, embeddings, tool-calling & retrieval.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich local chat UI (like ChatGPT) that talks to any Ollama model.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Android support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting and chat history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a coding copilot.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset for retrieval pipelines using Ollama generators & embedders.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: PDF chat, voice bots, function-calling, GPU offloading, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with auto-scaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) with multi-arch support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds and dev shells.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats or generates images via Ollama back-end.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings any Ollama model into channels/DMs.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a backend for Claude Desktop & friends.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI autocomplete and note Q&A powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-datasets
summary: Curated datasets and fine-tuning scripts to create custom GGUF models for Ollama.
